'''fakatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnology|arachnology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnology|arachnology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fakatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fækæthæth || fækæthæj || fækæthæsh || fækæthæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || fakakathath || fakakathaj || fakakathash || fakakatha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || fakathath || fakathaj || fakathash || fakatha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || fakafthafth || fakafthafj || fakafthafsh || fakafthaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || fakathatha || fakathaja || fakathasha || fakathaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || fakathath || fakathaj || fakathash || fakatha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || fakathathal || fakathajal || fakathashal || fakathakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || fakathaathatha || fakathaajaja || fakathaashasha || fakathaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || fakathathan || fakathajan || fakathashan || fakathakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || fakathathaoro || fakathajaoro || fakathashaoro || fakathakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
